message:
✨ Enhance Security dashboard with tabs, charts, and RBAC/compliance views

- Add tabbed interface (Overview, Issues, RBAC, Compliance)
- Add donut charts for severity, issue type, and compliance status
- Add RBAC bindings view with risk level indicators
- Add compliance checks grouped by category with progress scoring
- Add type quick filters on Issues tab
- Add mock data for RBAC bindings and compliance checks
- Make stats cards clickable to navigate to relevant tab/filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
